app.subtitle: Psychological self-assessments for everyday wellbeing
login.title: Sign in
login.description: Firebase auth wiring is prepared; connect your project keys.
catalog.title: Test catalog
history.title: Results history
result.title: Your result
tests.stressCheck.title: Stress Check (Short)
tests.stressCheck.description: A quick 4-question check inspired by the Android questionnaire flow.
tests.stressCheck.questions.q1: I feel tense or overwhelmed during the day.
tests.stressCheck.questions.q2: I struggle to disconnect from worries at night.
tests.stressCheck.questions.q3: My responsibilities feel hard to manage.
tests.stressCheck.questions.q4: I notice physical signs of stress (headache, muscle tension, etc.).
tests.stressCheck.results.low.label: Low stress
tests.stressCheck.results.low.advice: Keep your routine and monitor changes over time.
tests.stressCheck.results.moderate.label: Moderate stress
tests.stressCheck.results.moderate.advic: Add rest breaks and simple relaxation exercises this week.
tests.stressCheck.results.high.label: High stress
tests.stressCheck.results.high.advice: Consider speaking with a mental health professional for personalized support.
